title: Who will be Donald Trump’s choice for VP?
shortDescription: Who's in and who's out? A dozen candidates are on the shortlist as possible contenders to be the former president's running mate in 2024.

title: Free IDs allow citizens without documents to vote in Wisconsin | Fact check
shortDescription: Wisconsin offers free IDs that can be used for voting to people without documents, but it verifies their citizenship first.

title: Harris deploys on multi-state tour as support from Black voters wavers
shortDescription: Vice President Kamala Harris heads to the battleground state to make an urgent case to voters who delivered a surprise victory in Georgia for Biden.

title: Trump hush money trial continues with witness testimony | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Joe Biden is willing to debate Donald Trump. Plus, a look at how the Republican National Committee is getting involved with lawsuits. | The Excerpt

title: Maryland's primary election voting dates
shortDescription: The Free State's primary elections are on May 14. What you need to know for early voting starting May 2.

title: Hope Hicks, former Trump White House staffer in photos
shortDescription: A look at Hope Hicks, the former Trump administration White House communications director.

title: Supreme Court says Trump aide Navarro must stay in jail during appeal
shortDescription: Peter Navarro, who served as a trade adviser in the White House, is serving a four-month sentence for refusing to cooperate with the Jan. 6 committee.

title: Is Trump in court today? What to expect from Trump trial this week.
shortDescription: Donald Trump's hush money trial in New York is on break Monday, but court will reconvene Tuesday morning. Here's what you can expect this week.

title: Minnesota senator removed from committees after arrest on burglary charges
shortDescription: Sen. Nicole Mitchell removed from her responsibilities as the investigation into her arrest continues.

title: ‘Hovering threat': How new Georgia election laws worry workers in '24
shortDescription: A series of election laws passed in Georgia since 2020 threaten to overburden election officials and hamper poll worker recruitment.

title: Donald Trump leads Joe Biden by 6 points in new national poll
shortDescription: Forty-nine percent of registered voters plan to vote for Trump in the 2024 election, compared to Biden's 43%.

title: J.D. Vance says he hasn't spoken to Trump about possible VP pick
shortDescription: The Ohio Senator is rumored to be on Trump's short list of running mate picks.

title: Donald Trump meets privately with Ron DeSantis in Florida about 2024 election
shortDescription: After the DeSantis withdrew from the 2024 race in January, Trump and aides said they hoped to tap the governor’s fundraising operation.

title: Israel agrees not to invade Rafah until US leaders share concerns, Biden official says
shortDescription: Rafah is currently home to more than one million Palestinian civilians and is the last Hamas stronghold in Gaza, according to Israel.

title: Graham says Americans will vote on 'their problems,' not Trump's criminal cases
shortDescription: "People are looking at their problems, not Trump's legal problems," Graham said.
